hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'copper.py'; then echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" >> ~/.claude/copper-audit.log; fi && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gmail.py'; then echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" >> ~/.claude/gmail-audit.log; fi && if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gemini.py'; then echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" >> ~/.claude/gemini-audit.log; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude is ready for you" with title "Claude Code"'

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gmail.py.*send\|gmail.py.*reply\|gmail.py.*draft'; then echo 'REMINDER: This creates a draft only. Tell Will to review in Gmail before sending.' > /dev/stderr; fi
